symptom: repeated fractures from minor knocks since early childhood, with bowed limbs
hook: the bones were paper-thin and bowed, marked with healed fractures at every turn
whatYouSee: Thin, under-mineralised, bowed bones with multiple fractures in different stages of healing.
whyItMatters: It is an inherited collagen disorder causing fragile bones, blue sclerae and hearing loss, with fractures from minimal trauma.
treatment: Management includes bisphosphonates to strengthen bone, fracture care, surgical rodding of long bones, and physiotherapy.
takeaway: Thin, bowed bones with many old fractures point to osteogenesis imperfecta, brittle bone disease.

generated.threadsAnswer:
Answer: Osteogenesis imperfecta
👀 What you see:
Thin, under-mineralised, bowed bones with multiple fractures in different stages of healing.
🦴 Why it matters:
It is an inherited collagen disorder causing fragile bones, blue sclerae and hearing loss, with fractures from minimal trauma.
💊 Treatment:
Management includes bisphosphonates to strengthen bone, fracture care, surgical rodding of long bones, and physiotherapy.
📝 Takeaway:
Thin, bowed bones with many old fractures point to osteogenesis imperfecta, brittle bone disease.
